ops.title: ast-grep outline rules for uncovered languages
ops.description: Post tilth rip-out, non-ast-grep languages (Ruby, C, C++, C#, PHP, config formats) get honest fallbacks (head-window outline, grep-shaped symbol results, raw diff hunks). Add ast-grep outline rules per language as demand appears; each addition upgrades outline/symbol/diff simultaneously since all three ride astgrep.OutlinePaths.

ops.text: each added language: outline rules land upstream-or-local and the ext joins astGrepExts with fixture coverage
